title: fix(kube): gate SELinux volume warning note on host SELinux state
body:
Fixes #17743

`podman kube generate` always printed a NOTE about SELinux volume
permissions whenever a pod had volumes, even on non-SELinux hosts or
rootful setups. This added noise for most users.

This PR gates the warning so it only fires when actually relevant:
volumes exist AND SELinux is enabled on the host AND podman is
running rootless.

Added `shouldWarnSELinuxVolumes()` in `generate.go`, using overridable
package vars (`selinuxGetEnabled`, `rootlessIsRootless`) for testability.
Added a table-driven test in `generate_test.go` covering all 4
combinations of SELinux/rootless state.
